answer: The zip code 78704 shows significant activity in both datasets, with 2,244 mixed beverage gross receipts and 1,703 code violations reported. Similarly, zip code 78702 has 1,385 mixed beverage receipts and 1,573 code violations. These overlaps suggest areas with high business activity may also experience more code enforcement cases.
